final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original marketing poster (Xiaohongshu / RedNote 9-grid cover image) for a grassroots creator media account called "小书素人媒体", featuring the DJI Pocket 4 camera as the hero product.

Style/medium: Xiaohongshu (小红书) grassroots / 素人 UGC aesthetic — warm, approachable, slightly handcrafted feel; flat-leaning illustration mixed with lifestyle photo collage; NOT polished ad agency look
Composition: vertical 9:16 single-panel designed to function as one tile in a 9-grid Xiaohongshu feed; centered layout with clear visual hierarchy — product at mid-frame, title text dominant in upper-center zone, generous breathing room around edges
Subject: DJI Pocket 4 compact gimbal camera as the featured product, shown at a slight angle to reveal its form; surrounded by soft decorative elements (stickers, doodles, small stars or sparkles) consistent with 素人 style
Scene/backdrop: clean pastel or off-white background with subtle texture; optional light paper or linen grain to reinforce handmade vibe
Lighting/mood: soft, even, diffused daylight feel — bright and cheerful without harsh shadows
Color palette: warm pastel base (cream, blush, or soft mint) with one accent color (coral or sky blue) to make the title pop; product rendered in its natural color
Text (verbatim): "大强pocket4初体验" — placed as the central headline in a cute, playful, differentiated Chinese display font (rounded / bubbly / hand-lettered style); "小书素人媒体" as a smaller sub-label or watermark badge
Constraints: title "大强pocket4初体验" must be legible at thumbnail size; font must feel cute and distinct from standard system fonts — rounded bubble or hand-drawn stroke style; layout must read as a Xiaohongshu cover tile
Avoid: corporate advertising polish, dark backgrounds, harsh lighting, generic sans-serif fonts, overcrowded layout, watermarks unrelated to the brand
